method: Grouped 2025 challenge-window Strava activity details by local day; matched same-day Strava segment-effort names to 2026 official segment/trail names using the planner matcher; then reran build_plan cumulatively with matched 2026 segment IDs as completed.
caveat: Name-based Strava segment matching is useful for stress testing and time estimates, but it is not authoritative official Boise Trails Challenge completion evidence.
